title: Minimalistic Wall-Mounted Coat Rack – 4 Hooks on Stylish Modern Wooden Base for Wall & Door – 38cm – All Fixings Included (Satin Nickel/Dove Grey)
features: STYLISH & PRACTICAL: Our budget-friendly 38cm Minimalistic Modern Wall-mounted Coat Rack is designed to add a touch of elegance to your home while providing you with a practical storage solution for your coats, hats, scarves, and bags.

SPACE SAVING STORAGE: With four sturdy double hooks, our coat rack provides ample storage space for your daily essentials freeing up valuable floor space. Make your space work better for you with our space saving coat rack.

DURABLE & ECO-FRIENDLY: Made from high-quality materials, our coat rack is built to last. The wood used in our coat rack is sourced from sustainably managed forests, making it a responsible choice for your home.

EASY TO INSTALL: Our coat rack comes pre-assembled with all the necessary fixing, making installation a breeze. Simply follow the instructions below in the product description and you'll have your new coat rack up and ready in no time.

AVAILABLE IN 4 COLOURS: Our coat rack comes in four beautiful colour combinations to match any décor – matte black/white, satin nickel/white, satin nickel/dove grey, or matte black/ash effect. Choose the one that best fits your style and add a touch of elegance to your home.
